finding.summary: Stereo pad has a -4.1 dB left-right balance offset (left channel louder).
finding.probable_cause: Source recording or inherent channel mismatch; no track pan or FX applied to correct.
finding.confidence_reason: Direct measurement of stereo balance_db with low silence fraction (0.05) and verified isolated capture.

evidence_refs.description: Measured left-right level difference: -4.1 dB (left louder than right).

proposal.reason: The track has no FX chain; track volume and pan operations cannot independently adjust left/right channel levels to correct a -4.1 dB imbalance. A dedicated stereo balance plugin would be required, but no FX is available. Therefore no actionable move is possible via the supported operations.
